REQUIREMENT_TEXT: As a user, I can log in with my registered username and password.
As a user, I should be redirected to the event list page after successful login.
"As an authenticated user
PRIORITY: I should remain logged in after authentication until I explicitly log out."

REQUIREMENT_TEXT: Password input shall be masked (displayed as ‘*’ or dots) when typing in the login field.
As an authenticated user, I want to navigate between Home, Events, My Bookings, and Admin pages via the header menu.
The currently active page shall be visually highlighted in the navigation bar.
As an authenticated user, I can log out of the application using the Logout button.
As an authenticated user, I should see a landing section describing the platform purpose.
As an authenticated user, I should see a list of featured events on the homepage containing details including name, date, location and price.
As an authenticated user, I can access “Browse Events” from the homepage CTA.
As an authenticated user, I can access “My Bookings” directly from the homepage CTA.
As an authenticated admin, I can access "Manage Events" via dropdown opened from "Admin" button.
As an authenticated admin, I can access "Manage Bookings" via dropdown opened from "Admin" button.
As an authenticated user, I should see a list of upcoming events containing details (title, date, venue, price, available seats).
As an authenticated user, I should be able to search events by keyword (event name or venue).
As an authenticated user, I should be able to filter events by category.
As an authenticated user, I should be able to filter events by city.
Filtered results shall be displayed dynamically without requiring full page reload.
As an authenticated user, I can start booking an event via “Book Now”.
As an authenticated user, I am required to fill in my information to process the booking.
As an authenticated user, I want to receive confirmation after booking an event.
As an authenticated user, I want to see updated seat availability after booking.
As an authenticated user, I should see all my booked events.
As an authenticated user, I should see an empty state when no bookings exist.
As an authenticated admin, I want to add a new event via “Add New Event”.
As an authenticated admin, I am required to provide event details when creating an event.
As an authenticated admin, I should see newly created event in the list.
The system should respond to user requests within 2 seconds.
The system should function across major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge).
The UI should be responsive on different screen sizes.
